descriptionTemplate: Helot: Catena gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Place a {Crimson Shackles} into hand, and Helot: Catena's Command Cards gain {Retain}. At turn start, Helot: Catena's Base DMG +[Arg2]% for this battle.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Helot: Catena gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Place a {Crimson Shackles} into hand, and Helot: Catena's Command Cards gain {Retain}. At turn start, Helot: Catena's Base DMG +[Arg2]% for this battle. After unleashing Exalt {Sanguine Fetters}, grant each unique "Helot: Catena" Command Card in hand 35 stacks of {Temporary Enhance}.
